invariants.description: Every service importing auth-lib MUST call auth.init() in its entrypoint
invariants.message: Repository imports auth-lib but never calls auth.init() — this causes silent auth bypass

invariants.description: No repo should import both old-db-client and new-db-client
invariants.message: Repository uses both old-db-client and new-db-client — pick one to avoid connection pool exhaustion

invariants.description: No repo should use the deprecated console-logger package
invariants.message: Repository uses deprecated console-logger — migrate to structured-logger

invariants.description: Every gRPC client call must specify a timeout/deadline
invariants.message: gRPC client call without timeout — can cause cascading failures
